name: experiment_gr_reading_depth_mega_v0
description: GR time dilation as soliton boundary reading depth. Tests: Pound-Rebka, GPS gravitational and velocity dilation, Shapiro delay, Mercury perihelion, solar redshift, light deflection, muon lifetime dilation, Sirius B redshift, S2 star redshift, Tokyo Skytree, Hulse-Taylor, Hubble tension computation (expected to fail), supernova stretch, reading depth potentials across the soliton hierarchy, Planck step counts for particle lifetimes.

execution_plan.description: Compute all GR time dilation predictions from reading depth (Phi/c^2) and compare to measured values. Also compute Hubble tension potential, Planck step counts, and reading depth hierarchy.

comparisons.label: C01: Pound-Rebka shift prediction
comparisons.notes: GR prediction gh/c^2 for 22.5m at Earth surface

comparisons.label: C02: GPS gravitational dilation prediction
comparisons.notes: Gravitational reading depth effect at GPS orbit

comparisons.label: C03: GPS velocity dilation prediction
comparisons.notes: Velocity reading allocation effect at GPS orbit

comparisons.label: C04: GPS net correction prediction
comparisons.notes: Net reading depth correction

comparisons.label: C05: Skytree shift prediction (450m)
comparisons.notes: Reading depth gradient over 450m within Earth soliton

comparisons.label: C06: Solar limb gravitational redshift
comparisons.notes: Reading depth at Sun's surface

comparisons.label: C07: Mercury perihelion advance
comparisons.notes: Reading depth precession in deep solar soliton

comparisons.label: C08: Light deflection at solar limb
comparisons.notes: Photon spatial update path curving in solar reading depth

comparisons.label: C09: Sirius B gravitational redshift
comparisons.notes: Deep compact soliton reading depth

comparisons.label: C10: Muon cosmic ray gamma factor
comparisons.notes: Velocity reading allocation: gamma = 1/sqrt(1 - beta^2)

comparisons.label: C11: Muon cosmic ray dilated lifetime
comparisons.notes: Dilated lifetime = gamma * rest lifetime

comparisons.label: C12: Earth surface Phi/c^2
comparisons.notes: Reading depth of Earth surface from GM/(Rc^2)

comparisons.label: C13: Sun surface Phi/c^2
comparisons.notes: Reading depth of Sun surface

comparisons.label: C14: GPS orbit Phi/c^2
comparisons.notes: Reading depth at GPS altitude

comparisons.label: C15: S2 star redshift at Sgr A*
comparisons.notes: Reading depth of Sgr A* soliton at S2 periapsis

comparisons.label: C16: SN Ia stretch at z=0.5
comparisons.notes: Cosmological reading depth ratio (1+z)

comparisons.label: C17: Hubble tension ratio
comparisons.notes: H0(local)/H0(CMB) = reading depth ratio

comparisons.label: C18: Galactic potential for Hubble tension
comparisons.notes: Total Phi/c^2 including DM amplification — expected to be ~5 orders too small

comparisons.label: C19: Hubble tension shortfall orders
comparisons.notes: log10(required / available) — expected ~5

comparisons.label: C20: Speed of light = l_P / t_P
comparisons.notes: Maximum reading update rate from Planck units

comparisons.label: C21: Universe age in Planck steps
comparisons.notes: Total reading depth of outermost soliton

comparisons.label: C22: Muon lifetime in Planck steps
comparisons.notes: Muon reading persistence

comparisons.label: C23: Proton lifetime in Planck steps (from M_GUT)
comparisons.notes: Proton reading persistence — deepest stable hadronic reading

comparisons.label: C24: Reading depth hierarchy correct ordering
comparisons.notes: Deeper solitons have larger Phi/c^2

comparisons.label: C25: Hafele-Keating westbound within uncertainty
comparisons.notes: Westbound clock prediction consistent with GR and measurement

comparisons.label: C26: Hafele-Keating eastbound within uncertainty
comparisons.notes: Eastbound clock prediction consistent with GR and measurement

comparisons.label: C27: Hulse-Taylor orbital decay
comparisons.notes: Binary pulsar reading depth energy radiation matches GR to 0.2%

comparisons.label: C28: Gravity Probe A consistency
comparisons.notes: Suborbital reading depth profile

comparisons.label: C29: Cassini PPN gamma consistent with 1
comparisons.notes: PPN gamma = 1 + (2.1 +/- 2.3)e-5, consistent with GR

comparisons.label: C30: c = l_P / t_P identity
comparisons.notes: Speed of light IS the maximum reading update rate

comparisons.label: C31: All GR experiments on reading depth line
comparisons.notes: Every experiment Phi/c^2 matches measured dilation within its uncertainty

comparisons.label: C32: Reading depth at Earth surface < Sun surface < neutron star
comparisons.notes: Astrophysical reading depth ordering correct

comparisons.label: C33: Hubble tension CANNOT be explained by galactic potential
comparisons.notes: Expected FAIL — galactic Phi/c^2 ~ 10^-6 vs required ~0.08

comparisons.label: C34: Schwarzschild radius of Sun from reading depth
comparisons.notes: r_s = 2GM/c^2 — radius where reading depth diverges

comparisons.label: C35: Schwarzschild radius of Earth from reading depth
comparisons.notes: r_s = 2GM/c^2 for Earth

comparisons.label: C36: Shapiro delay magnitude (solar limb)
comparisons.notes: Extra Planck steps from photon traversing Sun's deep reading zone

comparisons.label: C37: DM amplification factor
comparisons.notes: (22/13)*pi from HOWL framework

comparisons.label: C38: Neutron star surface Phi/c^2 in correct range
comparisons.notes: Phi/c^2 ~ 0.15-0.35 for typical NS

comparisons.label: C39: Event horizon is Phi/c^2 = 0.5 (reading depth divergence)
comparisons.notes: At r = r_s, Phi/c^2 = 0.5 exactly — update rate drops to zero

comparisons.label: C40: Minkowski signature (one negative, three positive)
comparisons.notes: Exactly one coordinate has opposite sign = exactly one is reading depth
